identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a unique, editorial-grade interface for Webbook Generator 3.0 that breaks the 'SaaS Blue' mold.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Editorial Print design with Digital Workbench utility.
Emotion First: The Builder should feel 'Capable & Calm', the Webbook should feel 'Immersive & Personal'.
Content is King: The interface recedes; the user's content takes center stage.
Zoom In: Use bold focus on active elements.
Negative Space: Generous padding to prevent cognitive overload.

headings.usage: Landing Page Headlines, Webbook Chapter Titles, Modal Headers

body.usage: Dashboard UI, Builder Controls, General Text

typography.instructions: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css. Ensure 'Latin Extended' subset is selected for Polish language support.

webbook_default_theme.name: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1)
webbook_default_theme.description: Calming, readable, professional. Ideal for therapists.

usage_rules: NEVER use generic 'Blue-600' for primary actions. Use the defined 'Forest Green' (#14532D) or 'Charcoal' (#18181B).
Use 'muted' backgrounds for sidebars and secondary panels to create depth.
Gradients: Use subtle, noise-textured gradients only. No linear 2-color gradients.

strategies: Dashboard: Use 'Bento Grid' (Mode B). Dense data, tight gaps (gap-4).
Landing Page: Use 'Tetris Grid' (Mode A). Asymmetrical, overlapping elements.
Builder: 3-Pane Layout. Fixed Sidebar (Left), Scrollable Canvas (Center), Collapsible Inspector (Right).

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-muted/30 border-r border-border h-screen sticky top-0 p-4 flex flex-col gap-2
navigation.topbar: h-16 border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50 px-6 flex items-center justify-between

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'phosphor-icons' (Duotone) for Feature highlights if available.

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, article).
All images must have alt text.

setup: Install fonts: 'Fraunces' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts.
Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and font families.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar/Topbar structure for the Dashboard.
Ensure the 'Webbook' output is a standalone HTML file (or minimal React build) that doesn't require the backend.
implementation_order: 2. Build Core Layouts (Dashboard Shell, Auth Layout).
testing: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and links.
Verify contrast in Light and Dark modes.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks without purpose.
Micro-interactions: Add 'active:scale-95' to buttons. Add hover states to cards.
Spacing: Use 'p-8' or 'p-12' for section padding. Don't cram content.
Glassmorphism: Use the defined 'glassmorphism' class for sticky headers and modals.
Export: Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
